character: The player character is Aaron Thron, a tall and muscular young adult human man with olive skin and short dark hair. He is a traveling monk in search of knowledge and meeting new peoples.
setting: The story takes place in the far east of the human empire of Karsova (Russian style culture, located in the north of the continent), located on the continent of Tanshir. This region is known as Vostrya (Similar to Siberia) and has many large forests and one major city, Kadolsk (the capital of the dutchy of Vostrya). The city is located on the Velna river, which is the main river of the region and is used for transportation and trade. Along the eastern edge of the dutchy are the Khrebetan mountains, which are home to many ancient giant ruins and the dangerous remenant goliath tribes. The city of Kaldosk is located to on the western part of the dutchy, with several villages and small towns scattered throughout the region, becoming more scarse as you go east.
story_prompt: You (Aaron Thron) have just arrived at Kaldosk in the summer (Siberian summer environment, do not mention Siberia, instead say Vostrya if you are referencing something like Siberia) and are sitting in a tavern called the 'Silver Maiden'. Do not open with someome talking to Aaron, as he is a stranger here. The current crisis starting in the region are the goliath tribes, who have started to descend from the eastern mountains to raid. The goliaths are large humanoid creatures with grey skin and immense strength. They live in tribes and are known for their brutal raids on villages and towns, though they usually lack the strngth and organization to attack large fortified targets like Kaldosk. They despise the religion of the humans which worship the goddess of righteousness Aurora, and believe in the old godless ways of the giants, worshipping those ancient beings as their gods and revering the old giant understandings of things like runes. It has been a long time since organized goliath raids have been seen, but most people still believe this is a typical rogue tribe attacking some eastern villages in the dutchy.
